I wonder if I'll ever learn to swim
Or turn the white whale of grace in my sight
Or just disappear into this void


I wonder how it gets so heavy

Boaring ivory and wearing bone
Story told by ancient author's wisdom

Tower of ivory white
Stand alone in darkness bright
